title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Find answers to the most common questions about ZXSpace, including gameplay, BarkinMad Coins, power-ups, achievements, and the upcoming release.
summary: Quick answers to the questions players ask most often about ZXSpace.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
paragraphs: Looking for a quick answer? This page covers some of the most common questions about ZXSpace.
As development continues, this page will be updated with the latest gameplay information, release details, and new features.

faq.question: Is ZXSpace available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Not yet. ZXSpace is currently in development and will be released on the App Store once it's ready.

faq.question: What game mode is currently planned?
faq.answer: ZXSpace is centred around a fast-paced Solo city-defence experience where you protect your cities from waves of invading aliens.

faq.question: How do the controls work?
faq.answer: Move the cannon horizontally using touch controls while it fires automatically. Success comes from careful positioning, quick reactions, and making the most of your power-ups.

faq.question: Does ZXSpace use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. You'll earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.

faq.question: Which power-ups are available?
faq.answer: Current gameplay includes power-ups such as Double Laser and Shield Repair, with additional power-ups planned as development continues.

images.caption: Quick answers to help you prepare for ZXSpace.

featureShowcases.heading: Quick Answers When You Need Them
featureShowcases.summary: Find answers to common ZXSpace questions without searching through every guide.
body: Whether you're learning about the upcoming release, exploring gameplay features, or discovering how BarkinMad Coins and power-ups work, this page provides quick answers to the questions players ask most often.
For more detailed information, each answer links to the relevant guide so you can continue exploring ZXSpace.
bullets: Easy links to more detailed guides.

image.caption: Everything you need to know before defending your first city.
